name: neural-weights-en-us
model_lineage: v1.9.2-multilocale-au / step 40000 — the AU word-order fix on top of v1.9.1-multilocale-3order (shipped v4.13.0). ONE added variable: the G-NAF Australia 3-order shard (source-weight 6.0, country_weights += AU:1.0; #208/#148), 150k real G-NAF rows rendered canonical / postcode-first / locality-first (the same i%3 rotation the v1.9.1 overture shard proved). From-scratch 40k on A100 — the v1.9.1 recipe verbatim plus this one lever. RESULT (held-out AU OA coordinate, right-place @25km): 65→87 on the demo resolver (candidate-20j + #370 span-rescore + #194 Lever A, n=60/locale) — hits the reorder-probe ceiling (the model learned AU's postcode-first order; au-order-probe shows as-written == reordered). On the CLI resolver shard (admin + postcode-locality-intl), oa-au-coord 37.5→51.4 @25km (+13.9pp), recall 38→49 of 72. All-panel @25km 90.0→93.1%. Guardrails HELD on the shipped coordinate (gate-clean re-grade on a clean compile, scripts/eval/gates/v4.4.0-boundary.json): us.postcode 97.5, us.locality 73.1, us.region 87.7, us.street 78.2, de.native_locality 90.7, fr.postcode 99.5, fr.house_number 99.3, affix prefix 98.0 / suffix 94.9; mask-regression gate (#718) PASS (no tag regresses >2pp under the conventions mask); int8↔fp32 delta 0. Ship-config (requires) UNCHANGED from v1.9.1/v1.8.0. The US per-locale-F1 guardrail that gated the #208 probe's promotion is now confirmed.
phase: v1.9.2 multi-locale + AU — adds the G-NAF Australia 3-order shard (gnaf source-weight 6.0) on top of v1.9.1; AU right-place @25km 65→87 (demo config) / 37.5→51.4 (CLI shard) at zero US/FR coordinate cost; all-panel 90→93%

training.corpus_version: corpus-v0.9.1-multilocale (verbatim: char-offset base #519 + synth-fr-order #561 + fr-admin-split + overture-multilocale 3-order shard @ 3.0) + gnaf-AU 3-order overlay (#208, source-weight 6.0)
training.recipe: v1.9.2-multilocale-au: cloned v1.9.1-multilocale-3order verbatim (from-scratch 40k on the char-offset corpus + overture-multilocale 3-order shard @ source-weight 3.0) plus ONE added variable — the G-NAF Australia 3-order shard (gnaf source-weight 6.0, country_weights += AU:1.0; #208). The gnaf shard is the SAME i%3 canonical/pc-first/city-first rotation overture used, built by `mailwoman gnaf assemble` (G-NAF PSV join, 150k rows, held-out from the AU eval). conventions loss-mask OFF; CE-only; lr=1.5e-4 constant, warmup 1000, seed 42. The step-2000 dilution gate adjudicated (US/EU held, AU climbing). Loss-abort gate PASSED.

requires.$comment: The SHIP-CONFIG this model was TRAINED against (#718) — UNCHANGED from v1.5.0 (v1.8.0 cloned the v1.5.0-fr-order ship config; the single training variable was the fr-admin-split shard). The canonical ProductionScorer (@mailwoman/neural's createScorer) reads this and FAILS CLOSED if a required channel isn't actually fed — closing the #566/#685 trap where a channel-trained model scored channel-OFF silently goes OOD. Read off the gate it shipped against (scripts/eval/gates/v0.5.0-bridge.json: requires_gazetteer_lexicon=true, requires_conventions=auto, requires_bridge=false) plus anchor (the model exports anchor_features). Additive metadata only.

notes: v4.14.0 / v1.9.2-multilocale-au — adds the G-NAF Australia 3-order shard on top of v1.9.1's overture-multilocale 3-order recipe. The v1.9.1 model resolved AU at ~65% @25km because it never saw AU's postcode-first street-address FORMAT; the #208 lever is 150k real G-NAF rows rendered canonical/pc-first/locality-first (the same i%3 rotation overture used, `mailwoman gnaf assemble`) at source-weight 6.0 (the TARGETED-fix weight, matching synth-german/fr-admin-split; overture's 3.0 was for broad 16-locale exposure). RESULT: AU right-place @25km 65→87 on the demo resolver (candidate-20j + #370 rescore + #194 Lever A) — hits the reorder-probe ceiling (au-order-probe: as-written == reordered, the model learned the order); on the CLI shard 37.5→51.4 @25km (+13.9pp), recall 38→49/72. All-panel @25km 90.0→93.1% (AU misses 21→8, CZ 5→3, PT/PL/FR held, IT/AT each −1 row n=60 noise). Guardrails HELD on the shipped US/FR coordinate (gate-clean re-grade on a clean compile): us.postcode 97.5, us.locality 73.1, us.region 87.7, us.street 78.2, de.native_locality 90.7, fr.postcode 99.5, fr.house_number 99.3; mask-regression gate (#718) PASS; int8↔fp32 delta 0. Validated by an autonomous-promote canary (v192 vs v191 on perturbed real goldens): aggregate +1.7pp right-place, 0.6% new-overconfidence (no spike). Ship-config (requires) UNCHANGED from v1.9.1 — anchor+gazetteer+conventions(auto). Tokenizer 0.6.0-a0 (byte-identical). The G-NAF data is provenance-tracked (PSM/CC-BY-4.0 G-NAF, 150k held-out from the AU eval). KNOWN: int8 max fp32↔int8 delta ~0.3pp.

format.model: ONNX int8 dynamic (quantized from fp32, max fp32↔int8 delta 0.3pp)

calibration.method: isotonic-regression (PAVA) over per-span softmax confidence; OPT-IN via core/decoder createCalibrator
calibration.note: calibration.json + calibration-per-locale.json carried forward from v4.4.0 (architecture + label space unchanged across v1.5.0→v1.8.0). Re-fit recommended next train. Apply via @mailwoman/core/decoder's createCalibrator; default parse output is byte-stable when omitted.

gate_2026_06_19_fr_admin_split.promotion_gate: FR centroid gate PASS — surpasses v1.5.0 on the SHIPPED assembled anchor-ON coordinate (held-out FR golden, 3000 disjoint communes): coord p50 42.5→2.2 km, mean 175→105.5 km (−40%), région-emit 39.6→99.6%. US assembled coordinate FLAT (oa-resolver-eval, 2000 OA-US rows: locality-match 97.5→97.6, p50 3.3=3.3). Two label deltas trip the 2pp pre-publish gate, BOTH coordinate-invisible and operator-approved (#728): us.locality −2.2 (precision-only, 0 recall misses) and fr.country −3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR). No silent drift — both stated here + on #728 + the night postmortem.
flagged_deltas_coordinate_invisible: us.locality -2.2 (precision-only — 0 recall misses, spurious-FP on gold-locality-absent rows)
fr.country -3.5 (resolver given --default-country FR, never reaches the coordinate; abandoned v1.8.1 country-shard targeted this)

per_component_int8_shipconfig.$comment: per-locale-f1 anchor-ON matched pair vs v1.5.0 (postmortem guardrail tables). The unfolded per-tag F1 (split affix, intersections, etc.) is the authoritative `capabilities` block below. Tags off the FR-shard path (us intersections/unit, de native_locality, arena.perturb) were not re-measured for v1.8.0 — the single training variable was the FR admin-split shard and the architecture is identical to v1.5.0.

vs_1_5_0.fr_coord_p50: 42.5 → 2.2 km (−95%) — the win; first model in the arc to beat v1.5.0 on the shipped coordinate

files_md5.$comment: Source int8 artifact md5 (out/v192/model-int8.onnx). The PUBLISHED model.onnx md5 is re-verified against this at release Step 4 (npm pack); update if the publish pipeline post-processes the graph.

capabilities.$comment: Per-tier (server=anchor+gazetteer; pocket=anchor-only) × address-system × tag capability manifest (#718/#719). maskOffF1 = measured per-tag exact-match F1 with the conventions mask OFF; maskOnF1 = the same with mask ON (recorded only for tags some codex forbiddenTags row suppresses — the loader's delta-gate consults only those). createScorer FAILS CLOSED when a conventions row forbids a tag with maskOffF1 − maskOnF1 > 0.05 (the mask provably destroys a real capability). Generated by scripts/eval/gen-capability-manifest.ts against the v1.5.0 int8.
